titleStmt.title: SII 25.127: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 127. (A.R. No. 127 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the first prākāra in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
The details of the date of the record viz., Śaka 1309, Prabhava, Mēsha 2, śu 9, Thursday, Pūsam (Pushya) correspond to 1387 A.D., March 28.

It records the sale of the kāṇiyāṭchi right of the office of accountant by the Mūlaparushai-mahāsabhai of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu to the three individuals viz., Madhyasthan Brahmapriyaṉ, the accountant of the village Tirupputtūr Madhyasthan Chokkaṅārāyaṇaṉ Kariyamāṇikkāḻvāṉ alias Mahājana-priyaṉ of Maṭṭiyūr alias Nṛipaśēkharachaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in the above nāḍu and Vēṇḍavaḷandāṉ Āyappiḷḷai of Śiṟuvayal in Tēṉāṟṟuppōkku in Adaḷaiyūr-nāḍu. It states that the accountant Kulālaṉ Ambalattāḍuvāṉ alias Āyiratteḻunūṟṟu-mūvēndavēḷāṉ got the records forged to the effect that he got it from the sabhai the house-site and certain privileges in his village. He got the forged record engraved on the walls of the temple by the stone-mason Alaivāyugandāṉ of Tirukkōṭṭiyūr through the smith named Āyiratteḻunūṟṟuttaṭṭāṉ of Tirupputtūr.

The villagers came to know of this grāmadrōha which he had committed and thus he was handed over to the kaṇmāḷar from whom he reaped the punishment. On account of this act, the Ambalattāḍuvāṉ-s share of the kāṇiyāṭchi of the office of the accountant was brought to sale for a value of 300 Āḍūr-paṇam. The kāṇiyāṭchi land sold as sabhāviniyōgam yielded a value of 100 paṇam while the amount of 200 paṇam as kaṟpūramudal was given to Viśaiyālayadēva. Further, the mahāsabhai has bestowed on the purchaser the right of enjoying a house-site adjacent to the site of Brahmapriyaṉ. The document was attested by the accountant of the sabhai Madhyasthan Perumāṇḍāṉ Mayiteṟuvāṉ Brahmapriyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrī śakābdam 1000 3 100 9ṉ melcellāniṉṟa prabhava varuṣattu meṣanāyaṟṟu Iraṇṭāntiyatiyum pūrvvapakṣattu navamiyum brahaspati
vāramum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan=tirupputtūr mulavaruṣa mahāsabhaiyom nam murkkaṇakku madhyastaṉ brahmapriyaṉukkum
Iṉṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam maṭṭiyūrāṉa nirppacekarac caturvveti maṅkalattu madhyastaṉ cokka nārāyaṇaṉ kariya māṇikkāḻvāṉā[ ṉa ma] hājaṉa priyaṉukkum Ataṉaiyūr
nāṭṭu teṉāṟṟup pokku ciṟuvayaluṭaiyāṉ veṇṭa vaḷantāṉ Āyappiḷḷaikkum Āka Ivvaṉaivaṟkum kaṇakkeḻuttukkāṇiyāṭci vilai pramāṇam paṇṇi
kkuṭutta paricāvatu nammurkkaṉ kulālaṉ Ampalattāṭuṉāṉa Āyiratteḻunūṟṟu muventar veḷāṉ taṉakku grāmattil maṉaiyum mutaleḻuttum mutal
vaḻakkamum Illaiyāyirukkacci tesabhai taṉakkuk kalveṭṭikkuṭuttāka Ampalattile sabhaiyai
Ariyāmal grāmadrokamākak kāṇāmal kaḷavile nammur Āyiratteḻunūṟṟut taṭṭāṉai Āṭpiṭittu Ivaṉaik koṇṭu tirukkoṭṭiyūrkal taccuṉ
Alaivāyukantāṉai Aḻaippittu naṅ grāmattil maṉaiyum mutal Eḻuttum mutal vaḻakkamum taṉṉuteṉṟu kaḷavile kalveṭṭuvikkai
yil Ippaṭi ceyta grāmadrokam veḷippaṭṭu Ivvampalattāṭuvāṉ Oṭippokaiyil taṭṭāṉaiyyum kattaccaṉaiyuṅ kaikkoṇ
ṭu kaṇmāḷar kaiyyile kāṭṭikkuṭuttu Ivarkaḷai ṟaikku kaṇmāḷar Aḻiyac ceytu sabhaikkup porunta prāccittam paṇ
ṇi viṭukaiyil Inta grāmadrokam ceyta Ampalattāṭu vāṉāṉa Āyiratteḻunūṟṟu muven=tar veḷāṉ muṉṉillāmal Oṭip
pokaiyil nammuṟkaṇakkeḻuttukkāṇiyāṭciyil brahmapriyaṉ kāṇiyāṭci Oṉṟu pāti nikki Ivaṉo pāti Oṉṟu pātik
kum Ivaṉ Oṟṟi vilaikoṇṭa nilakkāṇiyāṭcikkum vilai niccayitta Āṭūra ø3 100 Itil Ivaṉ Oṟṟi vilaikoṇṭa kāṇiyā
ṭciyāy palaṟkum sabhā viṉiyokamāka viṟṟa nilattukku Āṭūr ø100 nikki tevar vicaiyālaya tevaṟku kaṟpūra mutalāka kuṭutta Āṭūr ø2 100
Ip paṇam Irunūṟṟukkum kaṇakkeḻuttu kāṇiyāṭciyum sutantraṅkaṅkaḷ Eppeṟppaṭṭaṉavum cantrādityavaṟ cellak kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom
mulaparuṣa mahāsabhaiyom Intak koḷkiṉṟa muṟaikkum naṅgrāmattil brahmapriyaṉ maṉaiyai Aṭukka Orumaṉai cermmā
ṉamāka Aṉupavippārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu kaṇakkeḻuttukkāṇiyāṭci vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom mula paruṣa mahā
sabhaiyom brahmapriyaṉukkum kariyamāṇikkāḻvā ṉukkum Āyappiḷḷaikkum Aruḷāl sabhaikkaṇakku madhyastaṉ perumāṇṭāṉ
mayileṟuvāṉāṉa brahmapriyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 25.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
